g.text: A WebSocketTransport is a new adapter under the same interface. Everything above the seam is unchanged; only the wire differs.
ABOVE THE SEAM — identical in both
frame-identity correlation · per-frame sampling & 250 ms batching
producer and consumer are written against this; neither names a transport
key compression + msgpack / CBOR at the wire
Serialization and compression live in the adapter, at the wire boundary — everything above the seam is oblivious.
